commands.review_summary:
The PR changes skills prompt path compaction so paths under the resolved OpenClaw config/state root stay absolute, with a regression test for the AlphaClaw-style managed skill path case.

PR surface: Source +13, Tests +27. Total +40 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high confidence: current main compacts managed skill prompt paths to ~/... while the read helper expands ~/ with os.homedir(), and the linked issue supplies live AlphaClaw before logs. I did not run the exact live Telegram/Docker loop in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the PR is a live-workflow bug fix but still lacks after-fix real runtime proof and needs maintainer product acceptance of the prompt path contract.

target.title: fix(skills): keep managed prompt paths readable
target.body:
## Summary

Managed skills in AlphaClaw Docker should now be advertised with the live runtime path the read tool can actually open, instead of a token-saving `~/.openclaw/...` path that can resolve to stale host/workspace locations.

This keeps the existing prompt compaction behavior for ordinary OS-home skill paths, but preserves paths under OpenClaw's resolved config/state root so container-installed managed skills remain readable.

## Linked context

Closes openclaw/openclaw#92875.

ClawSweeper labels on the issue at PR creation: `clawsweeper:no-new-fix-pr`, `clawsweeper:needs-maintainer-review`, `clawsweeper:needs-product-decision`, and `clawsweeper:needs-live-repro`. This PR is intentionally narrow and was opened after explicit operator approval despite the `no-new-fix-pr` label.

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: AlphaClaw Docker sessions could receive a skills prompt containing `<location>~/.openclaw/skills/world-cup-soccer-openclaw-skill/SKILL.md</location>`, then model/tool turns resolved that to dead paths such as `/home/art/.openclaw/...` or `/home/art/niemand/.openclaw/...` even though the live skill existed at `/data/.openclaw/skills/...`.
- Real environment tested: before-fix live AlphaClaw Docker repro is captured in openclaw/openclaw#92875 with OpenClaw `2026.6.6` / commit `a435706`, container env `HOME=/data`, `OPENCLAW_HOME=/data`, `OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=/data/.openclaw`, `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=/data/.openclaw/openclaw.json`, and gateway log excerpts showing `ENOENT` reads against stale `.openclaw` paths. After-fix prompt rendering was exercised from this branch with the same AlphaClaw-shaped environment values.
- Exact steps or command run after patch:

```sh
HOME=/data OPENCLAW_HOME=/data OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=/data/.openclaw OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=/data/.openclaw/openclaw.json NODE_PATH=/home/art/projects/tools/openclaw-src/node_modules /home/art/projects/tools/openclaw-src/node_modules/.bin/tsx --eval '<render one managed world-cup skill entry through buildWorkspaceSkillsPrompt and print its <location> plus stale-tilde check>'
```

- Evidence after fix:

```text
$ HOME=/data OPENCLAW_HOME=/data OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=/data/.openclaw OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=/data/.openclaw/openclaw.json NODE_PATH=/home/art/projects/tools/openclaw-src/node_modules /home/art/projects/tools/openclaw-src/node_modules/.bin/tsx --eval '<render one managed world-cup skill entry through buildWorkspaceSkillsPrompt and print its <location> plus stale-tilde check>'
location=/data/.openclaw/skills/world-cup-soccer-openclaw-skill/SKILL.md
contains_stale_tilde=false
```

- Observed result after fix: the rendered managed skill prompt location is `/data/.openclaw/skills/world-cup-soccer-openclaw-skill/SKILL.md`, and the stale prompt path `~/.openclaw/skills/world-cup-soccer-openclaw-skill/SKILL.md` is absent.
- What was not tested: I did not rebuild and run a full live AlphaClaw gateway from this branch or replay the Telegram topic end-to-end after the patch.
- Proof limitations environment constraints: this PR has live before evidence from the production AlphaClaw runtime and after-fix terminal output from the prompt-rendering code path in this branch; maintainers may still want live/crabbox confirmation before merge because the issue is labeled `needs-live-repro` and `needs-product-decision`.
- Before evidence: openclaw/openclaw#92875 includes the live prompt snippet, live file existence proof for `/data/.openclaw/skills/world-cup-soccer-openclaw-skill/SKILL.md`, and gateway `ENOENT` log excerpts for stale host/workspace `.openclaw` paths.

## Tests validation

```sh
PNPM_CONFIG_MODULES_DIR=/home/art/projects/tools/openclaw-src/node_modules node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/skills/loading/compact-skill-paths.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.read.host-tilde-expansion.test.ts
git diff --check
PNPM_CONFIG_MODULES_DIR=/home/art/projects/tools/openclaw-src/node_modules .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode commit --commit HEAD --thinking medium --parallel-tests 'PNPM_CONFIG_MODULES_DIR=/home/art/projects/tools/openclaw-src/node_modules node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/skills/loading/compact-skill-paths.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.read.host-tilde-expansion.test.ts'
```

Focused Vitest result: 2 files passed, 13 tests passed. `git diff --check` was clean. Medium autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

## Risk checklist

- Did user-visible behavior change? `Yes` - managed skill prompt locations can now remain absolute under the OpenClaw config/state root instead of being compacted to `~`.
- Did config, environment, migration behavior change? `No` - no config schema or migration change.
- Did security, auth, secrets, network, tool execution behavior change? `No` - this changes prompt-facing path formatting only.
- What highest-risk area? Prompt token cost can increase for managed state-root skills because the live absolute path is preserved.
- How risk mitigated? The preservation is limited to paths inside the resolved OpenClaw config/state root and realpath equivalent; ordinary OS-home compaction remains covered by existing tests.

## Current review state

Next action is maintainer review on whether preserving managed state-root paths in the skills prompt is the desired behavior versus a larger URI/read-tool resolution design. CI is running. ClawSweeper issue feedback was considered; this PR addresses the live-repro class with concrete before evidence and after-fix prompt-rendering proof, while leaving product decision to maintainers.

---

[![Compound Engineering](https://img.shields.io/badge/Built_with-Compound_Engineering-6366f1)](https://github.com/EveryInc/compound-engineering-plugin)
